issues.description: Missing duration constraint. Text '[Your Turn]' requires duration:'DuringYourTurn' to ensure the effect only works during your turn, not opponent's turn.
Trigger 'OnOpponentPlaysEvent' is not in official trigger list. Should use 'Trigger' with appropriate condition or use a valid trigger type.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [DON!! x1] [Your Turn] [Once Per Turn] Draw 1 card when your opponent activates an Event.
